content.name: Pokey's Engine Mod Rebalance
content.description: Turns engine mods into four clear archetypes at every tier: Interceptor (straight-line speed), Dogfighter (turning and strafing), Booster (boost burst) and Voyager (travel and spool-up). One carrier mod per archetype; the rest are parked at a small token value so each tier has a handful of real choices instead of a crowded field. Every mod gives exactly its printed value (no roll RNG) and higher tiers stay stronger. Numbers only, no new wares, savegame-safe.
content.author: Pokey

text.name: Pokey's Engine Mod Rebalance
text.description: Turns engine mods into four clear archetypes per tier: Interceptor (speed), Dogfighter (turn and strafe), Booster (boost burst) and Voyager (travel and spool-up), one carrier mod each. No roll RNG, strict tiers. Numbers only, savegame-safe.
text.author: Pokey
